COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-09-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF MCCOLM, PATRICIA IT IS THE JUDGMENT OF THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF, PATRICIA MCCOLM, BE AWARDED NOMINAL DAMAGES IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $25 ON HER CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND NEGLIGENCE. ON HER CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FRAUD AND NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION, PLAINTIFF SHALL BE AWARDED NOTHING. FURTHERMORE, IT IS THE JUDGMENT OF THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT, ARMANDO SAENZ, IS ENTITLED TO A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1500 AGAINST ANY DAMAGES AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. THE DAMAGES AWARDED ARE OFFSET BY THE CREDIT, AND PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER NOTHING. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT IS THE PREVAILING PARTY IN THIS ACTION AND HE SHALL RECOVER HIS COSTS PURSUANT TO
